summary.intent: Investigate the CHA-11 Linear issue (P1.4: CRM store SQLite) to understand the current state of the CRM crate implementation and identify any gaps before writing code.
summary.outcome: Investigation completed revealing the CRM crate has significant existing implementation but has two compliance gaps: missing `tracing` feature flag (per CLAUDE.md conventions) and `tracing` declared as a dependency but never used in source.

repo: CLAUDE.md requires all crates to have both `tracing` and `metrics` features, gated with `#[cfg(feature = "...")]`
The pattern for optional tracing is `tracing = ["dep:tracing"]` with tracing as an optional dependency, as seen in `vault` and `swift-bridge` crates
The CRM crate has a `metrics` feature but no `tracing` feature flag — inconsistent with project conventions
The CRM crate integrates with gateway via feature flag (`cfg(feature = "crm")`)

code.finding: `tracing` is listed as a non-optional dependency with no corresponding `tracing` feature flag, violating CLAUDE.md conventions
SQLite store implementation exists with migrations
In-memory store implementation exists alongside SQLite
Two migration files exist for CRM schema initialization
Gateway wires CRM behind a feature flag

workflow: Full workspace builds are slow; use per-crate `cargo check -p <crate>` for faster compile verification during investigation
Autonomous agent workflow uses Linear comments as a persistent workpad, appending at each milestone rather than overwriting
Investigation stage is strictly read-only — no source modifications, no branches, no PRs

friction: Full workspace build took long enough that the agent had to switch to per-crate compilation to get timely feedback
Background task outputs required multiple polling calls (`TaskOutput`) to retrieve results, adding latency to the investigation loop
open_items: Add `tracing` feature flag to `crates/crm/Cargo.toml` and make the dependency optional, matching the pattern in `vault` and `swift-bridge`
Add actual `tracing::` instrumentation to CRM source files (currently declared but never used)
Verify gateway feature flag wiring is complete for CRM in both `server.rs` and `services.rs`
Confirm all CRM crate tests pass cleanly before implementation stage begins
